Smart Waste Solutions

Our Smart Waste Management System enables authorities to monitor bins, manage drivers, and optimize vehicle routes using a centralized database-driven platform.

{/* ===== FEATURES ===== */}

Smart Bin Monitoring

Track fill levels and collection status in real time.

🚛

Fleet Management

Assign vehicles efficiently and track availability.

👷

Driver Assignment

Manage drivers and route responsibilities.

📊

DBMS Powered

Reliable, normalized relational database backend.

{/* ===== CALL TO ACTION ===== */}

Ready to manage waste smarter?

Access the internal dashboard to manage records efficiently.

Go to Dashboard

Smart Waste Management System

🌱 Efficient & Eco-Friendly Waste Collection Operations
